The '''YV-888 freighter''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] similar to the earlier [[YV-666 light freighter/Legends|YV-666 light freighter]]. It had a blocky hull and port and starboard maneuvering fins.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''
